name: io.github.johnbeans/ten
description: Ten formal algebra for machine intelligence communication — encode, decode, compose, filter, and verify structured messages without LLM inference

tools.name: ten_encode
tools.description: Build a Ten expression from a structured dict and return its binary wire format (base64)

tools.name: ten_decode
tools.description: Deserialize Ten wire bytes (base64 or hex) back into a structured expression dict

tools.name: ten_compose
tools.description: Algebraically combine two Ten expressions using sequence, product, nesting, union, or intersection

tools.name: ten_project
tools.description: Extract a subset of facet dimensions from a Ten expression

tools.name: ten_filter
tools.description: Evaluate Ten expressions against facet-based filter criteria (>=, <=, ==, !=)

tools.name: ten_describe
tools.description: Return a human-readable structural description of a Ten expression

tools.name: ten_verify
tools.description: Validate a Ten expression tree for structural integrity and check assertion metadata
